mapper.select:
SELECT * FROM task
AND status=#{status} AND title LIKE CONCAT('%',#{keyword},'%')
ORDER BY id DESC
SELECT DISTINCT t.* FROM task t LEFT JOIN task_member m ON t.id = m.task_id WHERE t.creator_id = #{userId} OR m.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY t.id DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO task(title, description, status, creator_id, guide_version_id) VALUES (#{title}, #{description}, #{status}, #{creatorId}, #{guideVersionId})
mapper.update: UPDATE task SET status=#{status}, stage_changed_at=NOW() WHERE id=#{id}
